text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I'm still an amateur, aren't I? I can't believe I got hurt. Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I've inconvenienced you as well, Trainer. For that,
I'm very sorry.
choice_data_list: I think it would be best to rest today.

You should pay more attention to your
surroundings from now on.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I've inconvenienced you as well, Trainer. For that,
I'm very sorry.
choice_data_list: I think it would be best to rest today.

You should pay more attention to your
surroundings from now on.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What?! Th-that's taking it too far! Just a little
medical attention would be enough!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Good grief. Aren't cuts and bruises a regular
occurrence in training? If something this small
worries you, you'll never get the chance to relax,
you know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Then... I don't know what to say.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Your concern has been thoroughly conveyed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If you insist, then I shall devote myself fully to
rest and recovery for the day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After treating Mejiro McQueen's injury, I see her
back to the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You're right... I mustn't be so focused that I
ignore my surroundings.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
However, the thought that I made such an
elementary blunder is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I feel guilty all over again...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After treating Mejiro McQueen's injury, I give her
the rest of the day off.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You're right... I mustn't be so focused that I
ignore my surroundings. Having said that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
One might say that my focus proves I was training
efficiently.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It would surely come in handy sometime if I
manage to better hone this ability to concentrate.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now, shall we return to our training before my
focus is broken?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After tending to Mejiro McQueen's injury, I
decide to resume her training, as she requests.
